home_hero_subtext: Open-run soccer in Scarborough, every Wednesday night. 6pm - 7:30. 18+, free, and all about the game. Lace up, show up, and play.
home_p1: An open run for ballers 18 and up, every Wednesday at Metrogolf Sportsplex. No fees, no commitment, just show up and play. This summer's first run is filling up now.
home_p10: 30 spots. 6 weeks. Free. Registration is open for Summer 2026. Claim your place on The Pitch.
home_p2: A structured, high-quality 6-week soccer clinic designed for youth aged 18 and under in Scarborough. Professional coaching, real competition, and a community that sees you. No fees, no barriers — just the beautiful game.
home_p3: Every session is structured for growth. Here's how a typical Wednesday at The Pitch runs.
home_p4: Arrive, gear up, check in with coach.
home_p5: Get loose, touch the ball, and sharpen your skills with our coaches.
home_p6: Time to put what you've learnt to the test. Real match play, real competition.
home_p7: Recap, feedback, and community. We close every session together.
home_p8: Our home base in Scarborough. Indoor turf, professional facilities, easy transit access. The pitch is ready — are you?
run_hero_subtext: Open-run soccer for ballers 18 and up. Every Wednesday at Metrogolf Sportsplex. No fees, no commitment. Bring your boots, link up with your city, and play.
run_first_note: Our first run · more Wednesdays all summer
run_h1: Claim a spot on the run.
run_p1: Reserve your spot, then roll through. Check in, lace up, and you're on.
run_p2: Small-sided games, balanced teams, real runs. Competitive but always welcoming.
run_p3: Meet the regulars, build your circle, and keep the midweek run going all summer.
run_p4: 30 spots only. Drop your details below and you're locked in for this Wednesday's run.
run_p5: We'll only use your info to confirm your spot. No spam.
about_p1: The Pitch is Toronto's next big soccer platform — a space where youth in Scarborough can discover their potential on and off the pitch. No barriers, no red tape. Just the game we all love.
about_p10: Our goal is to grow the love of the game across Scarborough and throughout Toronto, while building something bigger than just a season or a tournament. We're working toward becoming the go-to place to play soccer in the city.
about_p11: At the end of the day, this is about community. It's about giving people a place to belong, to compete, and to grow through the game we all love.
about_p14: The Pitch is growing, and we need people who care. Whether you can coach, mentor, or help behind the scenes — there's a place for you.
about_p2: Elevating the standard of soccer in Toronto through excellence, innovation, and community engagement — starting in Scarborough.
about_p3: To become Toronto's leading soccer organization — the go-to place to play the beautiful game in the GTA.
about_p4: No shortcuts. Every session, every match, every detail is held to a higher standard.
about_p5: Rooted in Scarborough. Every program is built with and for the people in it.
about_p6: Modern training, fresh structure, new opportunities — redefining what a league can be.
about_p7: Every player deserves to be seen. The Pitch puts names and stories on the map.
about_p8: Growing up in Scarborough, I saw firsthand how powerful the game can be. It brings people together across cultures, backgrounds, and experiences in a way few things can. At its core, soccer is the world's game because it asks for so little. All you need is a ball and a place to play. But despite that simplicity, access to structured, high-quality opportunities isn't always there for everyone. That's the gap The Pitch was created to fill.
about_p9: The Pitch is built by players, for players. It's designed with a real understanding of what the game means to the people who play it and what's often missing in traditional systems. This is more than just a league. It's a space where players can develop their skills, compete at a high level, and be part of something consistent and meaningful within their community.
register_p1: 30 spots available for our free Summer 2026 clinic. Fill out the form below to register. All participants must be under 18 and have guardian consent.
sponsors_p1: Align your brand with Toronto's growing soccer community. The Pitch offers meaningful, community-first partnerships that put your name on the field — real exposure, real impact, real connection.
sponsors_p2: Direct exposure to families and young athletes in the Scarborough community.
sponsors_p3: Your brand on display at every session, event, and digital touchpoint throughout the program.
sponsors_p4: Be part of something real. Your support directly funds free access to sport and builds community from the ground up.
sponsors_p5: Whether you're a local business, a national brand, or someone who believes in the mission — we'd love to hear from you.
summer_p1: The Pitch Summer 2026 Clinic is a free 6-week soccer program for youth aged 18 and under in Scarborough. Every Wednesday afternoon, we bring together young athletes for professional coaching, skill development, real competition, and community.
summer_p2: Playing sports changes lives. It builds confidence, teaches teamwork, keeps you active, and gives you something to look forward to every week. We believe every kid deserves access to that — regardless of their background or what they can afford.
summer_p3: This isn't just a clinic. It's a place to belong. Show up, play hard, and be part of something special.
summer_p4: Step on the field, challenge yourself, and walk off knowing you gave it everything. That feeling carries into everything else.
summer_p5: An hour of real training and match play every week keeps you sharp, healthy, and energized for everything else in life.
summer_p6: The best friendships are made on the pitch. Meet people from your community who share the same love for the game.
summer_p7: Only 30 spots available. Registration is open now for Summer 2026.
leagues_p1: A competitive soccer league built in Toronto, built for the community. Get ready to compete.
leagues_p2: Drop your info below and we'll let you know the moment registration opens.
leagues_p3: We'll never spam you. Just the good stuff.
volunteer_p1: Love the game and want to give back? We're looking for volunteers to help run our programs, mentor youth, and build this community alongside us.
volunteer_p2: Volunteering with The Pitch means being part of something that matters. You'll help young athletes grow — not just as players, but as people. Whether you've got coaching experience or just a passion for the game, there's a place for you here.
volunteer_p3: Toronto's Soccer Sanctuary. Building the love for the game, building the future, building community.
